mapper.select: SELECT wishlist_id AS wishlistId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, created_at AS createdAt FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1

SELECT w.wishlist_id AS wishlistId, p.product_id AS productId, p.title AS title, p.brand AS brand, p.category_name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.review_count AS reviewCount, p.rating AS rating, w.created_at AS wishedAt FROM wishlists w INNER JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND p.visible_yn = 'Y'
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND REPLACE(CONCAT_WS('>', p.category1_name, p.category2_name, p.category3_name, p.category4_name), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{category}, ' ', ''), '%')
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC, w.wishlist_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM wishlists w INNER JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND p.visible_yn = 'Y'
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND REPLACE(CONCAT_WS('>', p.category1_name, p.category2_name, p.category3_name, p.category4_name), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{category}, ' ', ''), '%')
